statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: This record is cross-layer verified. App surfacing and one-click actionability are tracked separately.

links.title: Repo power notes for docs-first power-control values
links.summary: Repo power notes contain an exact entry for Class1InitialUnparkCount, led by Docs/power/power.md:104.

links.title: Win25H2Clean 96-key phase-0 existence batch
links.summary: The 96-key existence batch confirmed Class1InitialUnparkCount exists on the clean baseline with observed value 64.

links.title: Shared docs-first string triage for current-build ntoskrnl
links.summary: Shared string triage found an exact current-build ntoskrnl.exe string hit for Class1InitialUnparkCount.

links.title: Shared Ghidra xref batch for docs-first power-control values
links.summary: The shared ntoskrnl Ghidra batch produced a reviewable string/xref artifact set for Class1InitialUnparkCount; some values resolved naturally while several remained forced-boundary fallback blocks.

links.title: Shared clean-baseline guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log for docs-first power-control values
links.summary: The guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log completed shell-safe on RegProbe-Baseline-Clean-20260329 but did not capture an exact runtime read for Class1InitialUnparkCount.

links.title: Guest-processed post-boot Procmon trigger batch for remaining docs-first power-control values
links.summary: A guest-processed post-boot Procmon lane ran powercfg queries, powercfg /energy, CPU stress, and profile-specific follow-up commands on RegProbe-Baseline-Clean-20260329. It captured path-level Control\\Power activity but still did not capture an exact runtime read for Class1InitialUnparkCount.
